overall.description: A third-person perspective follows a character walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk. The journey begins on an elevated sidewalk lined with palm trees and neon-covered skyscrapers, descends a concrete stairway under an overpass, and continues along a waterfront promenade beneath the highway where various NPCs gather near the water.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated concrete promenade in a futuristic city at dusk. To the left stands a teal office building while the center view is dominated by a dense cluster of neon-lit skyscrapers. Sparse pedestrians including one with distinctive green hair pass by, and palm trees in planters line the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway descending under highway overpass

events.description: character turns and begins descending concrete stairs into the lower level
entering darker shadowed area beneath the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking down a flight of concrete stairs into a dimly lit underpass area

gray concrete balustrade along the right side of the stairs
dark concrete underside of the highway overpass above

segments.scene_description: The character descends a wide concrete stairway that cuts down between building structures. The environment becomes increasingly shadowed as the character moves under the massive concrete overpass above, with only the distant neon glow from the skyline providing ambient light.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade under highway overpass with neon city backdrop

events.description: reaching bottom of stairs and entering open waterfront promenade area

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade under the overpass, passing NPCs sitting on benches and cardboard bedding

person in purple outfit sitting on concrete bench

dark water channel reflecting the neon lights from the buildings above
massive concrete highway structure overhead with support pillars
gray concrete seating blocks where NPCs are sitting
white umbrellas and stalls visible across the canal on the opposite bank

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a waterfront promenade beneath the massive highway overpass. The canal water reflects the vibrant neon signs from the towering skyline visible in the background. Various NPCs populate the area - some walking, others sitting on concrete benches or cardboard bedding on the ground. White market umbrellas are visible across the water, and the atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with mixed artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, elevated urban promenade down into the shadowed depths of a cyberpunk waterfront. It begins on a concrete walkway lined with palm trees and a teal office building, moving past sparse pedestrians toward a dense cluster of neon-lit skyscrapers at dusk. As the character descends a wide concrete stairway, the environment shifts from the open skyline into the heavy shadows of a massive overpass. The scene then opens onto a waterfront promenade beneath the highway, where the vibrant neon glow of the distant city reflects in the canal water. Finally, the camera glides past NPCs resting on concrete benches and cardboard bedding near white market umbrellas, fully immersing in the mixed artificial lighting of the lower city.
